programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Age Is Just a Number
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson is teaming up with Kimberly Schlapman to add one more award to her mantle: the Beat Bobby Flay Award!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Feel the Judgment

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fighting Irish

programme.desc: "Chopped" host Ted Allen and Food Network's Damaris Phillips try to rewrite history. Attempting to make Bobby Flay's domination a thing of the past are Southern heirloom chef Paul Fehribach and spunky pan-Asian chef Sara Nguyen.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Colorado Couple in Crisis
programme.desc: The couple that runs Millonzi's in Fairplay, CO, is buried in debt and on the brink of divorce. Robert Irvine must get Tim and Jenifer to work as a team again if they have any hope of salvaging their relationship or their 14-year-old restaurant.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Drop The Beat (Bobby)!

programme.desc: An abandoned city in the African jungle might have a bloody past of malevolent spirits and cannibals. Mount Vesuvius shows signs that it's awakening, and the mafia could be to blame. Experts investigate Hitler's secret Nazi UFO program.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Beasts of the Lost Jungle
programme.desc: A ghost town covered in a strange, white powder emerges from a lake in Argentina. When a lost jungle is discovered in Africa, scientists embark on a dangerous mission to explore it. A declassified CIA image uncovers a bizarre, giant Soviet weapon.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Desert Shipwrecks
programme.desc: Hundreds of shipwrecks are found in the middle of a desert in Africa. Then, visit a ghost town where hundreds of its inhabitants have mysteriously died. Also, something strange happens in North Korea.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Dagger of Tutankhamun
programme.desc: A dagger sealed in the tomb of King Tut for more than 3,000 years is made of a metal that seems to have extraterrestrial origins. A massive swastika is found in the desert near Roswell. Satellites hunt for the world's most wanted man, Joseph Kony.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Medusa
programme.desc: Experts investigate a strange glowing lake reported to turn things into stone. A mysterious structure in Africa that resembles Stonehenge is said to be the resting place of a mythical giant. A dark conspiracy could be at work in the Australian outback.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding King Arthur
programme.desc: An abandoned megacity in a remote jungle might be the home of an ancient treasure and a dark secret. When a mysterious circular stone structure is discovered in Scotland, experts investigate whether it's the fabled Round Table of King Arthur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secret of Doomsday Mountain
programme.desc: Satellites discover American stealth technology deep inside China. An unidentified cloud swamps America's skis. Finally, something truly massive is lurking beneath Loch Ness.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mafia Ghost Ship
programme.desc: A ghost ship with links to the mob suddenly appears on a California beach. Strange markings could be a coded message that reveals a plot to overthrow the Queen of England. A lake believed to have magical healing powers holds clues to life on Mars.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Bloodlust
programme.desc: When an officer pulls over a reckless driver in a routine traffic stop, he unlocks the key to a series of murders. Investigators from various jurisdictions work in tandem to track a sadistic killer with a penchant for torture, robbery, and bloodlust.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Lake Erie is home to more than 2,000 shipwrecks mostly due to it's shallow bottom. For local fisherman, Chris Leclair, navigating a double life proves just as treacherous. When his wife, Karen uncovers his dark secret he's caught in a net of lies.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Nightmare on Oak Hollow Drive
programme.desc: Etta Jean Westbrook is a long-time resident in a quiet suburb in Bryan, Texas. When she is found dead inside her home, detectives question her loved ones and canvass the neighbourhood in order to catch the killer before they strike again.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Last Party
programme.desc: A wild party ends in terror as a bright, young mom's cries for help fall on deaf ears. When detectives retrace her final steps they find a trap with no way out.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: What Happened to Lauren?
programme.desc: When a 27-year-old law student is reported missing and investigators later find a human torso in the trash can behind her apartment, it's undeniable that the two are related. Police in Macon, Georgia must act fast to catch a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: I'm Not Moving
programme.desc: A man returns from a work stint out of state to find that his neighbor has taken over his property to run a chop shop, resulting in an intractable feud that engulfs two families, and doesn't end until one of the combatants lies dead.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Don't Know Why He Spared Me
programme.desc: Thirty years on, Sharon Morris still wonders why former boyfriend Tony Fiebiger didn't kill her when he had the chance. There was a time when she felt only love for Tony, but as his sick crimes are revealed, she's grateful she's alive to talk about it.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: What Happened to Lauren?
programme.desc: When a 27-year-old law student is reported missing and investigators later find a human torso in the trash can behind her apartment, it's undeniable that the two are related. Police in Macon, Georgia must act fast to catch a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: I'm Not Moving
programme.desc: A man returns from a work stint out of state to find that his neighbor has taken over his property to run a chop shop, resulting in an intractable feud that engulfs two families, and doesn't end until one of the combatants lies dead.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Last Blanco
programme.desc: Michael Blanco never doubted the violent things his mother did were to keep their family safe until one day he learned the truth.

programme.title: Homicide City: Nine Months Murdered
programme.desc: When expectant mother Natise Johnson is found murdered days before she is due to give birth to her first child, Philly detectives focus on those closest to her. But soon they find Natise's life is much more complicated than anyone ever knew.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Big Sky Murder
programme.desc: A frantic woman calls 911 when she finds her husband shot to death. The investigation reveals allegations of harassment from the victim's ex-lover and eventually uncovers a complex trail of deceit, in a murder that was years in the making.

programme.title: Murder Calls: If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: When a man calls 911 screaming for help but too terrified to give his address, police scramble to find him. As detectives investigate, they uncover a shocking tale of torture and revenge one that proves that unrequited love can be deadly.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Lucifer
programme.desc: Dawnia Dacosta attends nursing school, while working the late shift. After work, she stops at church for evening services. One night, she runs out of fuel, and walks to the nearest station. Then a man in a van offers a ride back to her car.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: You Could Be Next
programme.desc: Theories arise when a sheriff's wife opens a door to a blaze of gunfire. When more citizens are shot at their front doors, everyone's left wondering who's next.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Mind Games
programme.desc: Jennifer Holliday is driving along a Texas highway at night when she is viciously blind-sided. From out of nowhere, a shotgun blast nearly severs her arm and as she frantically tries to recover, her attacker's reign of terror is only just beginning.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Devil in the Dance Hall
programme.desc: A murder within the small square dancing community of Texarkana, Arkansas leads investigators through a gauntlet of suspects with alibies and potential motives- including love triangles, jealousy and lots of money.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath: Dead Before Sunrise
programme.desc: The death of a prominent charity fundraiser leaves a tiny Kentucky community reeling. Investigators find themselves brushing shoulders with criminal biker gangs in pursuit of the killer and discover a twisted motive that shocks everyone.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Secret
programme.desc: Debra Coffey and Melissa Lewis are best friends working together at a prestigious law firm in Ft. Lauderdale, Florida. When Melissa is found brutally murdered in a canal, Debra is consumed with guilt as a dark secret is revealed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in Aspen
programme.desc: When an Aspen legend who once dated Jack Nicholson and Michael Douglas is killed in her sleep, everyone in the upscale resort town wants to know why and who did it.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Old Flames Die Hard
programme.desc: Sharmon Intili believes she's met the man of her dreams. Her friends think otherwise. A messy breakup and the rekindling of an old flame puts into play a calculated plan to wipe out the competition.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: A Fire Inside
programme.desc: When a serial arsonist murders four people in a California hardware store, fire investigators Marvin Casey and John Orr both become obsessed with the case. As fires continue to burn across the state, the two are pushed to their limits to stop the killing.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: An investigation on the murder of a mother focuses on her violent husband until a jailhouse snitch reveals new information.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Games of Homes
programme.desc: New neighbours disrupt the harmony that has existed between residents for years. Alliances change and terror reigns until a winter storm puts a bloody end to the feud.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Hunting a Lone Wolf
programme.desc: The FBI's in a race against time once an IED is discovered along a Spokane, WA parade route. It's a hunt that will take them all across the Pacific Northwest for a lone wolf suspect before he tries to strike again.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: The Boston Bandits
programme.desc: Up against an impenetrable code of silence in one of Boston's toughest neighbourhoods, a special FBI Task Force faces one of its toughest challenges yet, taking down a crew of professional robbers who've proven they're willing to kill.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.desc: Up against an impenetrable code of silence in one of Boston's toughest neighbourhoods, a special FBI Task Force faces one of its toughest challenges yet, taking down a crew of professional robbers who've proven they're willing to kill.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Hunting a Lone Wolf

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Unabomber: 20 Years of Terror
programme.desc: Unabomber Ted Kaczynski terrorized the country with mail bombs but when his brother David realized who was the Unabomber, he made a hard decision to turn Ted over to authorities. David shares his dramatic story with us and retraces the Unabomber's steps.

programme.desc: A family that had to delay pool plans after building a new home is finally ready to make their backyard vision a reality.

programme.desc: After saving for years, a couple of former teachers are splurging on the perfect pool for their new house in Austin, Texas. The nature lovers want a great view with sounds of waterfalls and space for family to visit.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lone Star State Update
programme.desc: After spending years living all over the world, Teresa and Jeremy find the perfect vacation home for their family in their home state of Texas. They're ready to put down roots, but their new lakefront home is in need of some TLC.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Modern Farmhouse Fix-up
programme.desc: In Texas, Dan and Emily find a waterfront home on Cedar Creek Lake that has tons of potential but needs a lot of work. They hope their budget is enough to give them the open floor plan and modern farmhouse look they desire.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big Reno With Astounding Views on Apple Valley Lake in Ohio
programme.desc: A couple customizes an Ohio lakefront home for their large family.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Missouri
programme.desc: Empty nesters leave snowy Indiana and find a large home on Lake of the Ozarks. The couple has a big renovation budget and wants to update the home to accommodate all their expected visitors. Unfortunately they soon discover a setback during demolition.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Big Wow on Alabama's Lake Wedowee
programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family. A local agent helps the couple land a charming lakefront property, but it's in need of major improvements.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Travel to Los Angeles, where the weather is warm and the local food is fantastic.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Memphis
programme.desc: From sweet deals on steak dinners at The Butchershop, to the guilty pleasure of indulgent surf and turf at Iris, Memphis is home to some of the best food you'll ever eat.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feats Of Meat
programme.desc: Chefs share the most mouth-watering meat dishes they've ever eaten.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago Neighborhoods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the neighborhoods that make Chicago a culinary treasure trove. From handcrafted burgers in the West Loop to street-style tacos in Wicker Park and barbecue chicken served up in Bronzeville.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: North Carolina's Triangle
programme.desc: Andrew digs into Raleigh, Durham and Chapel Hill- three tasty cities that make up North Carolina's Triangle. A hub for higher education with a booming tech industry, this region is home to a blossoming food scene.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hollywood
programme.desc: Andrew explores legendary hotspots and diverse culinary treasures in Hollywood, California. He highlights classic steak and martinis, Thai steamed whole fish, Armenian flatbread topped with minced beef and Persian ice cream.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Portland
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Portland, Oregon where free thinking foodies are pushing the limits when it comes to creating what to eat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Other Florida

programme.title: Fire Masters: A Blaze of Glory

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Grill Masters

programme.title: Bones: The Parts in the Sum of the Whole

programme.title: Bones: The Death of the Queen Bee

programme.title: Bones: The Predator in the Pool

programme.title: Movie: The Hitman's Bodyguard

programme.title: Movie: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When Jack Reacher returns to his old headquarters, he discovers he is being charged with a crime committed nearly 20 years ago. He travels across the country to make things right. His mission is to clear his name and that of his unit's new leader.

programme.title: Arrow: Heir to the Demon
programme.desc: As Laurel continues to unravel, Oliver and Lance try to convince Sara to stay in Starling City and finally reunite with Laurel and Dinah. Sara's fellow League of Assassins members come to town, and she realizes she is putting her family in danger.

programme.title: Arrow: Time of Death
programme.desc: Oliver brings Sara to the Arrow team. Watching Oliver and Diggle spar with Sara and talk old scars leaves Felicity feeling left out.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Sleeping With the Enemy

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The NCIS team partners with several federal agencies to track a sniper who is targeting crowded events in the city.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: Pride faces further backlash from the FBI when he helps former Navy Intelligence Analyst Elvis Bertrand, who is the lead suspect in a multiple homicide case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Blue Christmas

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Sister City
programme.desc: While Pride and the New Orleans team investigate a Russian sleeper agent who was involved with Abby's brother, Sebastian flies to D.C. to partner with Abby on the forensics in the case. Bishop drives through the night to deliver a package to New Orleans.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Undocumented

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Father's Day

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: No Man's Land

programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: Frasier: Duke's, We Hardly Knew Ye
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier can't bring themselves to inform Martin that they're investors in the group that is planning to tear down Martin's favourite bar.

programme.title: Frasier: The Botched Language of Cranes
programme.desc: Frasier causes a major rumpus when he advises a depressed caller to move out of Seattle. Facing pressure from the station management, he tries to make amends but manages to put his foot in his mouth every time.

programme.title: Frasier: The Candidate
programme.desc: Much to Frasier and Niles' disgust, Martin appears on a commercial endorsing a right-wing politician. Frasier decides to help an opponent by agreeing to appear in political ad, until he learns some disturbing information before the shoot.

programme.title: Frasier: Adventures in Paradise
programme.desc: Frasier heads for a vacation in Bora-Bora with a new flame, but finds an old one instead.

programme.title: Frasier: Adventures in Paradise
programme.desc: Frasier and Lilith are on Bora-Bora with their new lovers, but let competitiveness get the better of them causing Madeline to leave early. Frasier apologises on air and Madeline agrees to another date, but Lilith unexpectedly turns up yet again.

programme.title: Frasier: Burying a Grudge
programme.desc: Frasier tries to heal the 20 year rift between Martin and Artie Walsh, his old partner on the force, after seeing Artie in the hospital.

programme.title: Frasier: Seat of Power
programme.desc: After Frasier and Niles fail at fixing Frasier's leaking toilet, they call a plumber. Much to their horror, the plumbers turn out to be Frasier and Niles's high school tormentors, the Kriezel brothers.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz in the Doghouse
programme.desc: Bulldog asks Roz to become his producer, and she accepts despite Frasier's protests that Bulldog is only trying to seduce her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ladies of the Evening
programme.desc: The house is fumigated and the girls move into a Miami Beach hotel. Previously, Blanche had won three tickets to see the opening of Burt Reynolds new movie and passes to the party held afterwards where they could meet him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Isn't it Romantic
programme.desc: Dorothy's old friend, Jean comes to Miami for a visit and Dorothy decides not to tell Blanche and Rose that Jean is a lesbian. Then, after spending time with Rose, Jean begins to fall for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy's Little Lady
programme.desc: Blanche's dad announces he's remarrying; Rose and Dorothy enter a song-writing contest.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Vacation

programme.title: Movie: Harvest Love

programme.desc: A teen becomes obsessed with her new high school soccer coach and proceeds to sabotage his life and relationship after he refuses her sexual advances.

programme.title: Movie: A Deadly Price for Her Pretty Face
programme.desc: A single mom is kidnapped by two men who wish to sell her on the dark web. While held hostage in a remote cabin, she does whatever it takes to escape her captors and return to her daughter.

programme.title: Movie: Death Saved My Life
programme.desc: A woman discovers that her abusive husband has hired a hitman to kill her and realizes the only way to escape is to make it look like he succeeded.

programme.title: Derek Chauvin Trial Coverage
programme.desc: Watch coverage of Derek Chauvin's trial.

programme.title: Derek Chauvin Trial Coverage
programme.desc: Watch coverage of Derek Chauvin's trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.desc: Cameron is in charge of the school's spring dance, but when a popular teacher returns from sabbatical, a bit of not-so-friendly competition blooms. With Claire on chaperone duty at the dance, Phil gets Haley to accompany him to the realtor's banquet.

programme.title: Modern Family: Other People's Children
programme.desc: It's male-bonding day when Jay takes Luke into the garage to show him the way around tools and impart some manly wisdom, and Gloria goes with Claire and Lily to shop for Lily's flower girl dress.

programme.title: Modern Family: Las Vegas
programme.desc: The adults are Vegas-bound when Jay hooks them up with Excelsior Level hotel accommodations courtesy of one of his big clients, but after learning there's an even higher level, Jay becomes obsessed with upgrading.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Hard Jay's Night
programme.desc: Mitch struggles to hide his true feelings about the unflattering wedding topper Cam's father whittled out of soap for them. Phil tries to help Gloria sell her pre-Jay apartment, but they get sidetracked at the neighbourhood salon.

programme.title: Modern Family: Australia
programme.desc: The entire family tags along as Phil fulfills his mom's wish for him to return to his roots and visit the country where he was conceived: Australia. Unfortunately, Phil's attempts to embrace his native land are met by a lot of rejection.

programme.title: Modern Family: Sleeper
programme.desc: Phil fails at his task to stay home and wait for the repairman, forcing him to tell an elaborate lie to hide the truth from Claire, but the stress is more than he can physically handle. Meanwhile, Gloria is responsible for organizing the family portrait.

programme.title: Modern Family: Message Received
programme.desc: Jay, Gloria and Manny challenge each other to step outside their comfort zone and try something new. Mitch and Cam's wedding is getting too big and costly, so they resort to selling a couple of their prized possessions.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam’s big day is finally here and nothing can ruin it, until nothing turns into a whole lot of somethings and puts wedding planner extraordinaire Pepper Saltzman to the test. Jay and Gloria host the Tuckers. Phil squeezes in an eye procedure.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: The wedding day chaos continues as the entire party shifts from one contingency plan to another. Guests start to get testy, Mitchell and Cameron are feeling discouraged and poor Claire shows physical wear and tear.

programme.desc: The girls head to Atlantic City for a 'girls' weekend; Samantha can't trust Richard.

programme.desc: Samantha offers to help Carrie with her book cover; Charlotte shops on-line.

programme.desc: Carrie obsesses over a comment made about Aidan; Samantha baby-sits Brady.

programme.desc: The girls head to the Hamptons for the memorable wedding of a supposedly gay singer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: To Market, to Market
programme.desc: Carrie calms her nerves over a first date with a fellow author by going on another date.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Great Sexpectations
programme.desc: Carrie is disappointed by Jack's lacklustre performance between the sheets.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: Celebs: Just Like Us!?
programme.desc: The Osbournes, The Kardashians, Kendra Wilkinson, and Danny Bonaduce reveal the pros and cons of pioneering 'celebreality'. Host Andy Cohen ambushes Kim, Khloe, Kourtney, and Kris on set for behind the scenes stories of their iconic series.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: Is It Real?
programme.desc: Find out what was real and what wasn’t on some of reality TV’s first hit shows, when stars like Richard Hatch ('Survivor') and Julie Chen ('Big Brother') tell all. Andy Cohen reunites four original cast members of 'The Real World'; secrets are revealed.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: Addicted to Love
programme.desc: Stars of '90 Day Fiancé', 'Catfish', 'Rock of Love', and 'Temptation Island' reveal what really happened when they searched for love on reality TV. Jason and Molly Mesnick spill secrets of 'The Bachelor'.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: How the Other Half Lives
programme.desc: Andy Cohen and Real Housewives' Kyle, Teresa, and Caroline look at Reality TV’s fascination with the wealthy with never-before-seen footage. Plus, how hit shows like 'Love & Hip Hop', 'Jersey Shore', and 'Below Deck' turned regular people into mega-stars.

programme.title: Movie: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Andy Stitzer is 40 years old and has never had sex. His friends decide to make it their mission to rectify the situation, but they hit a roadblock when Andy falls in love with a mother of three who doesn't want sex to enter their relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Knocked Up
programme.desc: When a fun-loving guy impregnates an up-and-coming entertainment journalist, they put their differences aside and take a shot at love.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Flavor
programme.desc: Guy travels the South to try the unique flavours and authentic favourites from the region.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Guy is heading out to check in on family-run favorites. In Honolulu, a set of siblings are ready to roll their mom's Filipino food all around the island. Then, in San Diego, a taquaria has been serving taquitos the same way for three generations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Scratch Made Classics
programme.desc: This trip, some of Guy's favourites are totally homemade from coast to coast. In Manhattan, N.Y., a real deal chef is crankin' out homemade pretzels with a special beer cheese sauce.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Buns and Bagels
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns and bagels. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, an amped up deli serves lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Brunch, Bologna and Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing everything from brunch to burgers! In Louisville, Ky., a breakfast-lunch spot crankin' out southern comfort, like lamb grits and fried bologna.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bite of Britain
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's livin' it up in London, digging into a real-deal regional feast. First, a couple of British buddies smoke up true blue American 'cue. Then, a hip hangout gives classic fish-n-chips a modern makeover.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Culinary Journey
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road for on an off-the-chain culinary journey. On the Big Island, a Filipino-Hawaiian mashup making a name for leaving diners speechless.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Isle-Talian
programme.desc: Guy's diving into an island-Italian mashup. In Plymouth, Mass., a colourful joint dishes out a unique plantain sandwich and wings gone bananas. In Colorado Springs, a neighbourhood Italian spot serves up outrageous arancini and real-deal veal.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Sendin' the Surf & Turf
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri make recipes sent by DDD alums who join them via video chat. On this menu, there are fish tacos out of San Francisco, a Cajun shrimp creation comin' from Des Moines and sensational spicy Thai straight out of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Spice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing sandwiches, spice and everything nice, starting with lights-out lamb in Fargo, ND. A funky spot in Sioux Falls, SD, is loading up hand-held flavor bombs, and, in Fairbanks, AK, a wild pizza place is making spicy, sweet pies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken Trifecta
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into some winner winner chicken dinners! In Maui, Hawaii, it's a star-studded stop at Mick Fleetwood's joint serving the rocker's mom's favourite chicken, plus a dish that musician Sammy Hagar dives right into.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Indulgent Dishes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's indulging himself in righteous, rich recipes. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a crazy seafood spot is reelin' in off-the-hook gumbo and a spicy mahi specialty. Across town, a mother-daughter team is servin' up savoury lamb ragout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Multicultural Cooking
programme.desc: Guy digs into traditions from many cultures, including tortillas, tacos, Jewish deli food, and Puerto-Rican specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Small Town Standouts
programme.desc: Guy is hitting up small towns with big flavor. In Parkland, Wisconsin, the he stops at a roadside bar making sandwiches stuffed with brisket and crispy pork belly.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Sendin' the Surf & Turf
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri make recipes sent by DDD alums who join them via video chat. On this menu, there are fish tacos out of San Francisco, a Cajun shrimp creation comin' from Des Moines and sensational spicy Thai straight out of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Spice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing sandwiches, spice and everything nice, starting with lights-out lamb in Fargo, ND. A funky spot in Sioux Falls, SD, is loading up hand-held flavor bombs, and, in Fairbanks, AK, a wild pizza place is making spicy, sweet pies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken Trifecta
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into some winner winner chicken dinners! In Maui, Hawaii, it's a star-studded stop at Mick Fleetwood's joint serving the rocker's mom's favourite chicken, plus a dish that musician Sammy Hagar dives right into.

programme.desc: Guy digs into traditions from many cultures, including tortillas, tacos, Jewish deli food, and Puerto-Rican specialties.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road for on an off-the-chain culinary journey. On the Big Island, a Filipino-Hawaiian mashup making a name for leaving diners speechless.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Isle-Talian
programme.desc: Guy's diving into an island-Italian mashup. In Plymouth, Mass., a colourful joint dishes out a unique plantain sandwich and wings gone bananas. In Colorado Springs, a neighbourhood Italian spot serves up outrageous arancini and real-deal veal.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Sammies

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Beefed Up
programme.desc: Ina Garten is setting her sights on beef and sharing her tips for preparing it roasted, ground, sliced, sauteed and seared just like a pro. She starts with the perfect steak, an easy and elegant filet mignon with mustard and mushrooms.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Only Oranges
programme.desc: It's all about oranges, the magic factor in some of Ina's favourite recipes.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Going Green
programme.desc: The kitchen is honouring Earth Day with fresh finds for spring. Geoffrey Zakarian makes a Peruvian seafood stew with cilantro broth, and then Jeff Mauro goes green with his Italian stuffed artichokes. Katie Lee makes Asian-style eggplant 'meat' balls.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Impromptu Party
programme.desc: Giada shows how to host a fabulous last-minute party. Her menu includes focaccia with clementine and fennel, frozen fruit sparkling water, pantry mezzi with rigatoni with greens.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Earth Day Party
programme.desc: In honor of the 50th anniversary of Earth Day, Giada De Laurentiis shares a menu sourced completely from the garden and throws an eco-friendly party with all recycled products.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: 4 Ways with Beef
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is beefing things up with four recipes that feature meat. She makes a mashup of steak with creamed greens pasta, uses ground beef in taco tomatoes, wraps up mini beef wellingtons and tucks meatballs into a crispy Italian wrap.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making quick family meals at home on the ranch. There's pork marsala with mushrooms and a gorgeous grilled shrimp panzanella. Plus, Ree makes spinach artichoke calzones and shortcut creamy tortellini soup, a real 10-minute wonder.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Let's Get Green!
programme.desc: The Kitchen is going green with seasonal recipes and sustainable ingredients. The dishes include Lentil Stuffed Peppers, Broccoli Stem Salad and a Ratatouille Sandwich. Plus, the hosts create an Indoor Vertical Herb Garden and try upcycled snacks.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Breakfast Favorites Day or Night
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes breakfast an anytime event with a puffy omelette, everything bagel French dries and a simple fall salad with maple vinaigrette, then finishes everything with a peach bellini cocktail.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Southern Spread
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites his chef friends to bring the heartwarming hospitality of the South to the ranch. Marc Murphy puts his delicious spin on two Southern classics, shrimp and grits and charred corn salad with andouille sausage and red onion.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Cracking a Win
programme.desc: French chef David Baruthio and North Carolinian Blake Hartwick arrive at the arena. Anne Burrell and Andrew Zimmerman decide who will face Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Never Give Up
programme.desc: One shot at Bobby Flay wasn't enough for Italian chef Pasquale Cozzolino and Canada's infamous Ivana Raca, who are back for more. Iron Chefs Alex Guarnaschelli and Stephanie Izard give the play-by-play and dole out their final shot at redemption.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: The kitchen sizzles as fierce chefs Jeanie Roland and Becca Richards battle for their chance to take on Bobby Flay, all while Robert Irvine and Katie Lee keep Bobby in their crosshairs.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pie in the Sky
programme.desc: Maria Menounos and Scott Conant bring the glitz and glam to the competition. Branden Levine and Damon Gordon face off.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Broken Hearts

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chop of the Mornin' to Ya

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Shucking the Competition

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Unfinished Business

programme.desc: When Christine's parents can't make it to Grandparent's Day at Ritchie's school, New Christine suggests that Jeff, the new man in Christine's life, go as Ritchie's special friend. Christine then learns that Jeff really is a grandfather.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Oh God, Yes
programme.desc: Ritchie returns from a church festival with Richard and new Christine with a newfound interest in religion. Christine, who once had a bad experience at church, re-examines her beliefs and with Ritchie and Matthew in tow, decides to give God another go.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Barb moves in with Christine after announcing that she and Pete plan to divorce. Meanwhile, when Barb moves in, Matthew relocates to Ritchie's room where he discovers his nephew's strange sleep habits.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Champ

programme.title: The Aquarium: Seal the Deal
programme.desc: Two African penguins, Freya and Neo, welcome a young chick, but there's cause for concern when health problems arise. Staff work to train a trio of harbor seals to ride the elevator, with the only hiccup being a nervous seal named Floyd.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Runt of the Litter

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Capybara Casanova

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Giraffe Moving Day

programme.title: The Zoo: The Kings of Queens

programme.desc: Two former soldiers and their son return to Wiesbaden, Germany, as married civilians. They're looking for a large place with four bedrooms, and she wants a traditional home that's near the city center while he prefers something modern that's farther out.

programme.desc: A surprise job opportunity takes an Indiana doctor's family on an adventure to New Zealand. They're looking for a furnished home with four bedrooms and an updated kitchen, and he's budget-minded, but she's willing to spend more to get the perfect place.

programme.title: House Hunters: The Perfect House in Phoenix
programme.desc: An engaged couple struggles to find a home before their wedding in Phoenix, Arizona. They're looking for a house with three bedrooms and a big yard for their dog, but she's extremely picky and wants something Mediterranean style with high end finishes.

programme.desc: After two years in Japan, a US airman gets a new assignment in Daegu, South Korea. He's looking for a new development with a nice view that can accommodate visiting family, but on his small budget, a spacious place downtown may not be within reach.

programme.title: The Pacific: Gloucester/ Pavuvu/ Banika

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Monkey Kingdom
programme.desc: Southern Thailand is a place of both spectacular natural beauty and unexpected surprise - where spirituality pervades every bit of life. For the animals that live here, this is a natural wonderland.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Elephant Forest
programme.desc: In Central Thailands forests, fertile plains and even city streets, nature finds a way of living alongside people.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Hidden Tiger
programme.desc: In the jungles of Phu Khieo live some unusual primates. Phayres leaf monkeys live up to their name eating the leaves of around a hundred different types of plant.

programme.title: Wild Hawaii: Secrets of the Deep
programme.desc: Where the shores end, the real story begins. Head to the wet and wild Hawaii, with undersea rivers and creatures that can thrive and survive only in this location.

programme.title: Wild Hawaii: Land of Fire
programme.desc: Explore the fiery heart of Hawaii, from volcanic eruptions to spiders that smile, fish that climb and turtles that bury secrets in a landscape that defies expectations.

programme.title: The Wild Atlantic: Fire From the Deep
programme.desc: Explore the longest mountain range on Earth, the undersea Mid-Atlantic Ridge.

programme.title: Alaska Animal Rescue: Beast Friends Forever
programme.desc: A bald eagle prepares for freedom and a lonely caribou needs a new family.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Porcupine Posse
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley removes an odd lump from a French bulldog and investigates a cat’s seizures.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: No Horsing Around
programme.desc: A horse’s mysterious nosebleed urges Dr. Oakley to sniff out the cause.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Wild Wild Wolverine
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley traps a snarling wolverine to learn more about her ferocious species.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chernobyl's Nuclear Monsters
programme.desc: Strange circles of reindeer appear in the remote tundra of Sweden, experts investigate if this mysterious event could be evidence of fatal aftershocks from the Chernobyl nuclear disaster.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Armageddon USA
programme.desc: When the people of a thriving Midwestern town suddenly disappear, they leave behind an eerie ghost town with a dark secret. Experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if the mysterious exodus could be evidence of a freak natural disaster.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monsters of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The center of the Milky Way is home to strange and deadly phenomena that we don't yet understand, but using the latest science, experts are revealing how the supermassive black hole our galaxy's core shapes life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Planet 9
programme.desc: Scientists have discovered a mysterious ninth planet on the very edge of our solar system. Ten times the size of Earth, this strange world could have moons with extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Universe's Deadliest
programme.desc: The universe is a dangerous place, and we explore the deadliest spots in the cosmos. Between earth and the edge of the universe, there are a million ways to die, and our crash test dummy is on a mission to reveal the worst.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secrets of Time Travel
programme.desc: Time travel might be more possible than we ever imagined, and today, cutting-edge technology and the latest research into black holes and wormholes is helping experts get steps closer to discovering how to travel through time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dawn of Life
programme.desc: We're on the verge of uncovering the how life on Earth came to be. Our origin is a hotly contested scientific debate.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Journey to a Black Hole
programme.desc: Journey to the heart of the M87 supermassive black hole, the first and only black hole ever photographed, and explore the mystery of how it grew so large, what lies inside and how it controls the entire galaxy.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mission to a Comet
programme.desc: The Rosetta mission was a ground-breaking expedition to land on a comet. Learn what the journey discovered and how these objects helped create life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Cassini's Final Secrets
programme.desc: For twenty years, NASA's Cassini spacecraft revealed the strange secrets of Saturn until it vaporized in its atmosphere in a blaze of glory. Today its legacy lives on, as fresh data from the probe helps scientists make brand-new discoveries.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Aliens of the Microcosmos
programme.desc: The hidden kingdom of microscopic alien organisms shapes the universe as much as galaxies, stars, and planets. New discoveries reveal how bacteria, viruses, and other alien micro-organisms built life on Earth and influence humanity's future in the cosmos.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Midnight Murders
programme.desc: Carla Stefaniak, a spirited Florida insurance agent with a passion for travel, heads to Costa Rica. But on the day she's supposed to return, she vanishes. And in 2014, 19-year-old college student Pravin Varughese disappears after a party.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: When a young family suddenly vanishes from their Southern California dream home, friends and family are left with dozens of unanswered questions. Authorities suspect they fled the country, until an unlikely source uncovers the truth.

programme.title: Web of Lies: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: A young girl has lewd photos of her taken at a party, with no memory of the night. Her world is turned upside down and the public shaming pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Ditched and Desperate
programme.desc: Breaking up is never easy but it can be murder.

programme.title: Aileen Wuornos: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: America's first female serial killer wrote down her darkest secrets for her best friend while on Florida's death row. Now, for the first time, those secrets are revealed in detail as the written words of Aileen Wuornos tell us what really happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: One Last Shot
programme.desc: A family's worst nightmare begins when 30-year-old Jennifer Krajnak is gunned down after a night out with friends at a bar in Lemon Grove, California. Investigators zero in on multiple suspects but it's surveillance footage that leads to her killer.

programme.title: Aileen Wuornos: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: America's first female serial killer wrote down her darkest secrets for her best friend while on Florida's death row. Now, for the first time, those secrets are revealed in detail as the written words of Aileen Wuornos tell us what really happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: Beth's Last Party
programme.desc: On December 23rd 2009, Beth von Steinner goes missing. Days later, her frozen body is found in a trash pile behind her house. With no witness or suspects, only CCTV footage can unlock the mystery of who killed her.

programme.title: Deadly Women: A Family Tragedy
programme.desc: Home is where the heart is and a killer lurks.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Devil's Advocate
programme.desc: St. Paul, MN, 1963: Carol Thompson, church-going wife and devoted mother of four, is found in a bloody heap on her neighbor's doorstep. Now detectives must peel away the layers of her picture-perfect life to reveal the painful secrets the 1960s housewife.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Teenage Wasteland
programme.desc: Lincoln, NE, 1958: When two love-struck, sex-crazed teenagers embark on a killing spree in Lincoln, Nebraska, it will fall to one local sheriff to put the brakes on this nightmare of a joy ride.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Bedtime Murder
programme.desc: Libbi Baume is found violently stabbed to death in her own bedroom. Libbi was a kind hearted pre-school teacher, well-liked in the community so people find it shocking to think she would know anyone who would want to kill her.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Luxury, Jealousy and Murder
programme.desc: Wealthy and successful businessman Ben Novack Jr. is found bludgeoned to death, midway through a large New York convention.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Murder in the Cabin
programme.desc: When millionaire Bob Bosley is shot to death in his cabin, his wife Amy claims a robber killed Bob and dashed off into the woods. A wide search turns up nothing, but an investigation into Bob's lifestyle turns up many interesting details.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Late Night Killer
programme.desc: Norma Rodriguez is found dead, her head wrapped in duct tape in a baffling and brutal crime.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Complicated Relationship
programme.desc: A beloved mother of four disappears just days after her stepdaughter vanished. Police must investigate to find out if their complicated relationship led to tragedy.

programme.title: True Conviction: Family Under Fire
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania family is decimated when masked men ambush them at home with guns and crude bombs, killing a mom and her daughter. The shell-shocked family points the finger at one of their own, but lack of evidence stalls the case for 30 agonizing years.

programme.title: See No Evil: In His Father's Footsteps
programme.desc: The ambush of 22-year-old college student Richard Bailey on October 20, 2008, leaves a community desperate for answers. With no forensic evidence left at the scene, detectives turn to surveillance footage to track down Richard's killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Don't Know Why He Spared Me
programme.desc: Thirty years on, Sharon Morris still wonders why former boyfriend Tony Fiebiger didn't kill her when he had the chance. There was a time when she felt only love for Tony, but as his sick crimes are revealed, she's grateful she's alive to talk about it.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Delphi Killer
programme.desc: A quiet rural town is rocked when two middle-school girls go on a hike and are later found murdered. But when police discover one of the girls may have recorded her killer with her cellphone, the race is on to find the mysterious man.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Depths of Depravity
programme.desc: The body of a 20-year-old woman turns up in the most gruesome way imaginable severed and stuffed into trash bags.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hunting Season
programme.desc: A 27 year old mother of two disappeared from a small vacation town in Wisconsin in 2008. Family, friends, local reporters and police investigators recall the fear and sadness the shocking crime instilled on their tight-knit community.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: House of Horrors
programme.desc: In Sacramento, Dorothea Puente runs a boarding house. Mentally ill Alvaro 'Bert' Montoya is among Dorothea's favorite tenants. Until a terrible stench rises up through the rafters, and Bert unwittingly exposes something sinister… And deadly.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Serial Deception
programme.desc: When dozens of women vanish from the sunshine state in the late 60s, they're presumed runways. It isn't until police discover the bodies of two missing teens that they uncover the sadistic work of a prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Manson: The Prison Tapes
programme.desc: Relive the horrific Tate and LaBianca murders, and the media circus surrounding the trials of cult leader Charles Manson and his 'family' of misfit killers.

programme.title: Waco Standoff: As We Watched
programme.desc: On April 19, 1993, FBI agents attacked a religious compound in Waco, Texas, occupied by a small obscure religious cult. 76 people, including 26 children, died. The repercussions of Waco are still being felt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run With My Brother
programme.desc: Mark and Maverick Maher were punks who formed their own militia with a band of youths who robbed houses and broke into cars.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through an Air Duct
programme.desc: After killing a man, ex-con Rondell Reed crashes his getaway car and is sent to prison. He and his cellmate escape by squeezing through an air duct. Once free, he steals and carjacks his way north to Ohio where another chase leads to another car crash.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fetch a Hooker
programme.desc: Lane Slettvet, a muscle man for a drug dealer, liked to test fate. One night on a job to pick up a prostitute, Slettvet stabs a man. He tries to stay under the radar, but still goes to parties for the drugs.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be the 'Green Baron'
programme.desc: Tony Darwin makes millions piloting marijuana into Florida. Even after getting caught, he continues works for a notorious smuggler until a deadly plane crash forces him to flee the country.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob a Pawn Shop
programme.desc: Stolen weapons dealer, Conan Helsley, robs a pawnshop with his girlfriend and older brother. Cops eventually hunt them down and put the trio behind bars, but Conan manages to escape!

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Global Grub
programme.desc: Roger Mooking takes 15 gastronomical trips for the most exotic, flavourful and spicy foods all without leaving the U.S. The featured chefs create classic international meals from Ethiopia, Thailand, Mexico and more in their own American kitchens.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoking and Spit-Roasting in Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking finds two chefs in Texas who are pushing the boundaries of whole hog barbecue, where pigs are roasted low and slow over coals before the meat is chopped or pulled and seasoned with sauce.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Lockhart, Texas, to meet the team responsible for designing and crafting a monster rig that offers seven different cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ and Boils in the Bayou
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Louisiana bayou for barbecue, brunch and a crawfish boil. In Prairieville, L.A., he helps a husband-and-wife team of caterers prepare baby back ribs, brisket and 200 pounds of live crawfish.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Couples
programme.desc: From live-fire cooking to low-and-slow barbecue, Roger Mooking meets up with two couples making fiery feasts and creating sparks in California.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lighting Up Louisiana
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Louisiana, where smoked meat makes an appearance in many classic Cajun dishes. He meets Chef Nathanial Zimet, who serves North Carolina-style smoked whole hog in po' boy sandwiches at Bourree in New Orleans.

programme.title: Good Eats: Waiter, There's a Fish in My Soup

programme.desc: The boys create a PhineasandFerbalizer to speed up the growing process of vegetables.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ask a Foolish Question/ Misperceived Monotreme
programme.desc: When Candace discovers that Phineas and Ferb have invented a computer that can answer anything, she asks it how she can finally bust her brothers. Then, Perry misses his 100th battle against Doofenshmirtz to go to a charity pet wash with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run, Candace, Run/ Last Train to Bustville
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb's newest invention is a pair of boots that make the wearer extraordinarily fast. Candace decides to borrow them so she can be in two places at once. Then, the kids decide to create and race a giant hot air balloon at their grandparents.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Great Balls of Water/ Where's Pinky?
programme.desc: When Candace thinks Jeremy is bored with their usual hangouts, she sets out to find something unique to do with him. When Pinky goes missing, Phineas and Ferb create a machine that amplifies Buford's sense to those of a dog's.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London with no human supervision.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Cargo of Kit Cloudkicker!
programme.desc: Della, Dewey, and Huey recruit a showboating pilot to take them to an island full of monsters in search of a Missing Mystery, unaware that Don Karange is hot on their tails.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Trading Chips / Mini Noodle Burger Max
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: The Owl House: Wing It Like Witches
programme.desc: Not your average underdog story.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: Young Blood, Old Souls
programme.desc: Luz's skills as a witch are put to the test when she attempts the impossible.
